title: Senior Plant Manager at Reckitt India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Reckitt India
jsonLd.description:
Reckitt India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Reckitt India:
Reckitt India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reckitt India!
